creator: tcppmm@gmail.com
text:
Postfix is build with SASL and TLS support, but when I turn it on in log it say: 
warning: restriction `reject_authenticated_sender_login_mismatch' ignored: no SASL support.

How-To-Repeat: Install postfix-2.6.2_1,1 and cyrus-sasl-2.1.23 from ports, and configure postfix with TLS auttentificaction.
